findings.message: FR-1: escape hatch reason "ok" (2 chars) < 8. Substantive rationale required для audit trail. См. .claude/rules/specs-workflow/variant-matrix/escape-hatch-audit.md anti-gaming guidance.

FR-1 полиморфный по axis 'adapter' (4 triggers: "for each adapter", "for each adapter", "across all doctypes", +1 more) но AC Decision Table отсутствует или incomplete. Build matrix через Skill("variant-matrix-build") OR add escape hatch [skip-variant-matrix: <reason ≥8 chars>].
